name: 𝕏TV MediaStudio™
description: Telegram bot for renaming, converting, and organising media — with MyFiles storage, YouTube download, and Mirror-Leech.

MAIN_URI.description: MongoDB connection string. Free tier works: https://www.mongodb.com/cloud/atlas

CEO_ID.description: Telegram user ID of the bot owner (only this user can open /admin).

ADMIN_IDS.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs of additional admins.

PUBLIC_MODE.description: Set to true to open the bot to everyone; leave false for single-user / admins-only.

DEBUG_MODE.description: Set to true for verbose logs.

TMDB_API_KEY.description: Optional — enables title matching, posters, and auto channel routing. Get one free at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

SECRETS_KEY.description: Optional — Fernet key used to encrypt Mirror-Leech provider credentials at rest. Required only when you enable Mirror-Leech. Generate with: python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"
